song.title: Oh How I Love This Blessed Book
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Oh, how I love this blessed Book! The story of redeeming grace, Love letter of my Bride groom’s heart And mirror of my Savior’s face.
[V2] 2) Oh, how I love this blessed Book! My checkbook on the bank above, Deed of my heav’nly heritage And dying will of Him I love.
[V3] 3) Oh, how I love this blessed Book! Bright telescope through which I view The wonders of the world to come And gaze on glories ever new.
[V4] 4) Oh, how I love this blessed Book! My guide book all my earthly way, The lamp that cheers my darkest night, The sunshine of my brightest day.
song.author: Albert B. Simpson
